# PresentMon

This directory contains the official 64-bit PresentMon console application used by vrctool.

- Project: https://github.com/GameTechDev/PresentMon
- Version: 2.4.1
- Binary source: https://github.com/GameTechDev/PresentMon/releases/download/v2.4.1/PresentMon-2.4.1-x64.exe
- Packaged filename: `PresentMon.exe`
- SHA-256: `d74183e7ae630f72cd3690be0373ecbfdc6cbb86578148aab8fa2a7166068f34`
- License: MIT, see `LICENSE.txt`

The binary is redistributed unmodified. vrctool targets `VRChat.exe` by process ID and consumes PresentMon CSV output; it does not inject into or read memory from VRChat.
